_comment: English (base locale). All other locale files fall back to these strings for any missing keys.
cmd.fail: Command execution failed, try again later.
cmd.stOffline: This command requires SillyTavern to be connected. Use /sthelp to see available commands.
reply.noResponse: Something went wrong and no response was found. Try again?
reply.generationFailed:
Generation failed. Your message was retracted - try again.

Error: {{message}}
switchchar.invalidIndex: Invalid number: {{n}}. Use /listchars to see options.
switchgroup.invalidIndex: Invalid number: {{n}}. Use /listgroups to see options.
listchats.empty: No chat history for current character.
switchchat.fail: Failed to load chat "{{name}}". Check the name is exact.
switchchat.invalidIndex: Invalid number: {{n}}. Use /listchats to see options.
charimage.groupEmpty: No members found in the current group.
mood.noExpr: No active expression is available right now. Make sure expressions are enabled in SillyTavern.
mood.noExprCached: No active expression is available right now, and no stored mood exists for that character yet.
mood.wrongChar: Current visible mood is for **{{owner}}** (**{{expression}}**). Mood for **{{name}}** is not currently visible in SillyTavern and has not been seen yet.
reaction.invalid: Invalid mode. Use one of: off, status, full.
image.usage:
Usage: /image <prompt> or /image <keyword>
Keywords: you, face, me, scene, last, raw_last, background
Use /image cancel to stop an active generation.
image.nothingToCancel: No active image generation to cancel.
image.breakerOpen: Image generation is temporarily paused after repeated failures. Try again in ~{{seconds}}s.
image.rateLimited: Too many image requests in a short time. Please wait a minute and try again.
image.placeholder: 🎨 Generating image… (timeout: {{minutes}} minutes; use /image cancel to abort)
image.noImage: Image generation failed. Make sure ComfyUI is running and try again.
image.noChat: Could not find the SillyTavern chat element.
image.fetchFailed: Image was generated but could not be fetched from SillyTavern.
image.timedOut: Image generation timed out. Please try again.
impersonate.suggestion:
💭 *Suggested response* _(feel free to copy, edit and send as your own)_:
{{text}}
persona.usage: Please provide a persona name. Example: `/persona Aria`
mypersona.disabled: Saving persona preferences is disabled by the server administrator. Use `/persona <name>` to switch manually.
mypersona.usage:
Usage: `/mypersona <name>` - save your persona so it switches automatically each time you chat.
Use `/mypersona clear` to remove your saved preference.
Use `/listpersonas` to see available personas.
mypersona.cleared: Your persona preference has been cleared. Messages will use whatever persona is currently active.
mypersona.saved: Persona _{{name}}_ saved. It will be set automatically each time you send a message.
setlang.reset: Language preference cleared. Using the server default.
setlang.unknown: Unknown language: "{{input}}". Use /setlang with autocomplete to pick from the list.
setlang.usage: Usage: /setlang <language name>. Use autocomplete to see available languages.
note.none: No author's note is currently set.
unknown.cmd: Unknown command: /{{cmd}}. Try /sthelp for available commands.
status.title: ## 🐲 __Bridge Status:__
status.stOffline: _SillyTavern is not connected. Character information and image statistics are unavailable._
status.imagePaused: ⏸️ Paused - cooling down ({{seconds}}s left, will resume automatically)
status.statsLine4: > 🔁 Overload trips: **{{trips}}** | 🚧 Requests blocked during cooldown: **{{blocked}}**
help.title: ## 🐲 __Bridge Commands:__
help.offlineNote: _SillyTavern is not connected - only the commands below are available without it._
help.offlineInfo:
**Information & Status**
> `/sthelp` - Show this menu
> `/status` - Show bridge and platform status
help.info:
**Information & Status**
> `/sthelp` - Show this menu
> `/status` - Check connection and image stats
> `/history [n]` - Show last n messages (default: 5)
help.chars:
**Characters & Groups**
> `/listchars` | `/listgroups` - List characters / groups
> `/switchchar` | `/switchgroup` - Switch character / group
> *💡 `/switchchar_3`, `/switchgroup_2` etc. work as plain text messages*
help.chats:
**Chats**
> `/listchats` | `/switchchat` - List and load saved chats
> `/newchat` - Start a fresh chat
help.persona:
**Persona**
> `/listpersonas` - List your personas
> `/persona <name>` - Switch your persona
help.persona.mypersona: > `/mypersona <name>` - Save your persona for automatic use; `clear` to remove
help.convo:
**Conversation**
> `/continue` - Continue the last AI message
> `/impersonate [prompt]` - Have the AI write your next message
> `/note <text>` - Set the Author's Note; omit text to read it
help.lang:
**Language**
> `/setlang <language>` - Set your preferred language for bot responses
> `/setlang clear` - Reset to the server default language
help.expr:
**Expressions & Appearance**
> `/charimage` - Post the character's picture
> `/mood` - Show the character's current expression
> `/reaction <mode>` - Set mood display: `off`, `status`, or `full`
help.image:
**Image Generation**
> `/image <prompt or keyword>` - Generate an image (`you`, `face`, `me`, `scene`, `last`, `raw_last`, `background`)
> `/image cancel` - Cancel active image generation
help.footer:
~~                                                                                                                                          ~~
*Developed by **Senjin the Dragon** - <https://github.com/senjinthedragon>*
*Please support my work:* <https://github.com/sponsors/senjinthedragon>

disc.notAuthorized: You are not authorised to use this bot.
disc.notAllowedChannel: This bot is not enabled in this channel.
disc.notConnected: Bridge is not connected to SillyTavern.
disc.imagePlaceholderUpdate: 🎨 Generating image… ({{remaining}}; use /image cancel to abort)
disc.lateImage: _(Image arrived after timeout - consider increasing `imagePlaceholderTimeoutSeconds` in config.js.)_
ui.tooltip.expressionMode: Controls how the character's mood is shown in Discord. Off disables it entirely. Status only updates the bot's Discord status bar. Full also posts the expression image to the active channel whenever the mood changes.
ui.tooltip.allowPersonaSave: When on, Discord users can type /mypersona [name] to save their persona - it will then switch automatically on every message they send. Turn this off to manage all persona assignments through config.js only.
ui.checkbox.crossRelay: Relay messages to all connected clients
ui.tooltip.crossRelay: When on, a message typed on one platform (Discord, Telegram, Signal) is immediately echoed to all other connected platforms so every client stays in sync. When off, messages only reach the platform where they were typed.
